title: dodonaea boroniifolia
intro: Dodonaea boroniifolia, also known as the 'native hopbush', is a plant species native to Australia and New Zealand, belonging to the family Sapindaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Dodonaea boroniifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and provide relief from colds and flu. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
